authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(6) — Aptos Creek (Santa Cruz Co.)
CDFW — Low Flow Fishing Regulations
sources.quotedText: Shall be closed to all fishing when the department determines that flows are impeding fish passage.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days of the season; closed all other days within the Dec. 1 - Mar. 7 window. Applies from the mouth to the bridge on Aptos Creek Road. Also subject to Low-Flow Restrictions, Section 8.00(c).

regulations.humanSummary: Open December 1 through March 7, but only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and opening/closing days, from the mouth to the bridge on Aptos Creek Road
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only on Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead per day, combined; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession, combined.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily bag limit; 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Also see Low-Flow Restrictions, Section 8.00(c): closed to all fishing when the department determines that flows are impeding fish passage.

regulations.humanSummary: Also subject to low-flow closure: closed to all fishing when flows are determined to be impeding fish passage

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
